mapper.insert: insert into score_record ( submit_id, score, comment, grade_time ) values ( #{submitId}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{gradeTime} )
mapper.select:
select hs.id as submitId, h.title as homeworkTitle, c.course_name as courseName, sr.score as score, sr.comment as comment, sr.grade_time as gradeTime from homework_submit hs
left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id
left join course c on h.course_id = c.id
left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id
where hs.student_id = #{studentId}
order by hs.id desc
